Training Plan — For Adam

Goal: Shift 67/26 aerobic/strength split → 50/40. Cap aerobic at ≤8 hrs/wk; push lifts to 5–6 hrs/wk. Four dedicated lifts/week with hypertrophy rep ranges (6–12), progressive overload, priority on rear delts, upper back, upper chest, calves.

Weekly Schedule

Mon
with Adam · 6am
Upper Push
Chest + delts + triceps. Soccer 7–8pm.
Tue
solo · 7am
Muay Thai
Zone 3–4. No lifting.
Wed
with Adam · 6am
Upper Pull
Back width + rear delts + biceps. Padel 4pm.
Thu
solo · 8–9am
Outdoor Run
Cap 45–60 min, zone 2.
Fri
solo · 8am
Lower
RDL + squat + calves + posterior chain.
Sat
solo
Active Recovery
Padel + surf. Zepbound dose AM.
Sun
solo · 10am
Weak-Point Volume
Rear delts + calves + upper chest. Soccer 6–7pm.

Monday — Upper Push (with Adam)

Incline Barbell Press Priority4 × 6–8RPE 8, 3-min rest
Flat DB Press3 × 8–10RPE 8, 2-min rest
Seated DB OHP4 × 8–10RPE 8
DB Lateral Raise Priority4 × 12–15Strict, slow eccentric
Cable Lateral Raise3 × 12–15Drop set on last
Tricep Rope Pushdown3 × 10–12—
Overhead Tricep Extension3 × 10–12—

Wednesday — Upper Pull (with Adam)

Weighted Pull-up Priority4 × 6–8Add load progressively
Pendlay Row (Barbell)4 × 6–8Strict, no torso swing
Cable Row (Wide Grip)3 × 10–12Squeeze rear delts/mid back
Face Pull (Cable) Priority4 × 12–15External rotation emphasis
Rear Delt Fly (DB or Cable) Priority4 × 12–15Pause at peak contraction
Incline DB Curl3 × 10–12Full stretch
Hammer Curl3 × 10–12—

Friday — Lower (solo)

Romanian Deadlift Priority — protects C5/C64 × 6–8Controlled; posterior chain focus
Front Squat or Belt Squat3 × 8–10Easier on spine than back squat
Bulgarian Split Squat3 × 10/side—
Hip Thrust3 × 8–10—
Standing Calf Raise Priority4 × 10–123-sec eccentric
Seated Calf Raise Priority4 × 15–20Pause stretch

Sunday — Weak-Point Volume (solo, optional)

Face Pulls (high volume)4 × 15Light-moderate load
Lateral Raise (myo-reps or drop set)4 × 15—
Incline DB Press (light/pump)3 × 12–15Upper chest emphasis
Rear Delt Fly (prone/bench)4 × 15—
Calves (standing or donkey)4 × 15—
Core circuit (optional)10–15 min—

Programming Guardrails

  • Progressive overload: add 2.5–5 lb on main lifts when top-end of rep range is hit for all sets for 2 consecutive sessions.
  • Deload every 6–8 weeks: reduce volume ~40%, keep intensity.
  • Post-lift cardio: 10–20 min jog logged as separate workout. Don't let it creep past 25 min.
  • C5/C6 protection: no behind-the-neck pressing, avoid heavy barbell back squat, RDL > conventional deadlift.
  • Shoulder (pinched, Feb 2026): coordinate with Dr. Polski. Scap-stabilization warm-up before pull day.
  • CYP2C9 intermediate: no NSAIDs for soreness. Use turmeric, curcumin, omega-3, cold exposure.

Nutrition Plan — Lean Gain Mode

Maintenance estimate for a 190 lb active male at 14 hrs/wk training: ~2,950 kcal/day. Lean-gain surplus: +200–250 kcal. Target BF 12–14%; trigger 4–6 wk mini-cut if BF exceeds 14%.

3,150
kcal/day
surplus mode
200 g
Protein
1.05 g/lb floor
380 g
Carbs
~2.0 g/lb
95 g
Fat
~0.5 g/lb

Meal Timing Template

  • 5:30am pre-lift: smoothie — 30g whey + 60g oats + banana + creatine 5g + Gorilla Mode (~350 kcal, 35g P)
  • 7:30am post-lift: 3 whole eggs + 40g oats + berries + Greek yogurt + Transparent Labs Post (~700 kcal, 50g P)
  • 12:30pm lunch: 6 oz chicken/salmon + 1 cup rice + greens + 1 tbsp olive oil + avocado (~750 kcal, 50g P)
  • 3:30pm snack: Greek yogurt + fruit + almonds, or protein shake + apple + nut butter (~400 kcal, 30g P)
  • 7:00pm dinner: 6 oz steak/fish + potato/rice + veggies + olive oil (~750 kcal, 45g P)
  • 9:30pm pre-bed: casein shake or Greek yogurt (~200 kcal, 25g P)

Zepbound-Specific Notes

  • Appetite suppression is the #1 failure mode for hitting surplus. Track protein daily — food log on Sat dose days especially.
  • Prioritize calorie-dense additions: olive oil, nut butters, avocado, full-fat Greek yogurt, macadamia nuts. Each tbsp of olive oil = 120 kcal with zero appetite cost.
  • Keep GI-friendly (SLC26A3 proctocolitis): moderate fiber, watch onion/garlic/artichoke, rotate proteins.
  • CGM TIR currently 99% — carbs are well-tolerated. Don't under-carb out of caution.

Supplement Plan

Keep — current stack

  • Creatine monohydrate 5g — daily in smoothie
  • Magnesium — evening, sleep/recovery
  • ProOmega (EPA/DHA) — increase to 3g/day for >8% index
  • NMN Synergy (2x daily) — NAD+ longevity
  • Neo40 Pro — nitric oxide
  • Turmeric + Quercetin — NSAID replacement
  • Ther-Biotic Complete + Leaky Gut Revive — GI
  • Gorilla Mode pre-lift — AM training days
  • Transparent Labs Post — post-lift smoothie
  • LMNT — 2×/day base, 3–4× intense days

Add — for hypertrophy + longevity

  • Whey isolate 25–40g — 1–2×/day to hit 200g protein under Zepbound
  • Vitamin D3 5,000 IU + K2 MK-7 100 mcg — T + bone (confirm 25(OH)D)
  • Ashwagandha KSM-66 600mg — evening, cortisol/sleep
  • Beta-alanine 3–5g/day — optional, high-volume accessory work
  • Casein 30g pre-bed — overnight MPS
  • EGCG / matcha — APOE4 neuroprotection
  • Methylated B-complex — once B12 normalizes
  • Fulvic acid — mitochondrial
Genetic constraints: CYP2C9 intermediate — no NSAIDs. APOE4 heterozygous — avoid high-saturated-fat surplus foods; prioritize olive oil, fatty fish, avocado. Monitor LDL/ApoB quarterly during lean-gain.

16-Week Periodization Block

Phase 1
Weeks 1–6 · Hypertrophy
  • Rep range: 6–12
  • Kcal: +200–250 surplus
  • Target: +2–3 lb lean
  • Focus: rear delts, upper back, upper chest, calves
  • Deload week 7
Phase 2
Weeks 7–10 · Strength
  • Rep range: 4–6 main, 10–12 accessories
  • Kcal: maintenance
  • Target: neural adaptations, lock gains
  • Deload week 11
Phase 3
Weeks 11–14 · Mini-Cut
  • Kcal: –400 deficit
  • Protein: 1.1–1.2 g/lb (220g)
  • Volume –20%, intensity held
  • Target: –6–8 lb fat
Phase 4
Weeks 15–16 · Peak
  • Kcal: refeed to maintenance
  • Restore glycogen
  • Re-DEXA week 16
  • Target: BF 10–11%, photos

Top-Line

18-month body target: Falcon/Mackie or Black Panther/Boseman. 2–3 year stretch: Blade/Ali. 3–5 year aspirational: Killmonger/MBJ. Above ~195 lb LBM is frame-limited for your height — Kang/Majors shown for context only. Highest-leverage training change: rear delts + upper back volume. Highest-leverage nutrition change: hit 200g protein daily under Zepbound appetite suppression. Highest-leverage split change: cap aerobic at 8 hrs/wk, add Sun weak-point session.
